reach_why: Extends familiar AI overconfidence critiques, but does not open clearly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Connects confidence, heuristic transfer, vivid irrelevance, and formal-domain limits in a non-obvious synthesis.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing filtering accuracy when models inherit heuristics alone versus heuristics plus grounded judgments.
explanation: Narrative confidence and vivid details can mislead narrowing unless grounded judgments and formal constraints guide selection.
